issues.message: Canonical points to a different URL than the page itself
issues.impact: Conflicting canonicals can prevent the intended URL from ranking.
issues.recommendation: Make the canonical match the URL you want to rank; use absolute, HTTPS URLs.

issues.message: 2 pages share the same canonical URL
issues.impact: Multiple pages canonicalizing to the same URL can lose unique indexing.
issues.recommendation: Audit whether each page should be self-canonical or merged.

issues.message: 4 pages share the same canonical URL
issues.impact: Multiple pages canonicalizing to the same URL can lose unique indexing.
issues.recommendation: Audit whether each page should be self-canonical or merged.

issues.message: Site is served over HTTP without HTTPS
issues.impact: Browsers flag HTTP pages as insecure and Google uses HTTPS as a ranking signal.
issues.recommendation: Install a TLS certificate (Let's Encrypt is free) and 301-redirect all HTTP to HTTPS.

issues.message: Meta description too long (163 chars)
issues.impact: Long descriptions get truncated.
issues.recommendation: Trim to under 160 chars.

issues.message: 2 pages share the title: 'NihongoDoya — JLPT N5/N4 Grammar, Vocabulary & Kanji'
issues.impact: Duplicate titles split ranking signals across pages.
issues.recommendation: Make every title unique and specific to that page's intent.

issues.message: 4 pages share the title: 'JLPT N5 & N4 Grammar Notes (Lesson-wise) | NihongoDoya'
issues.impact: Duplicate titles split ranking signals across pages.
issues.recommendation: Make every title unique and specific to that page's intent.

issues.message: 2 pages share the same meta description
issues.impact: Duplicate descriptions confuse users and waste SERP real estate.
issues.recommendation: Write a unique description for each page.

issues.message: 4 pages share the same meta description
issues.impact: Duplicate descriptions confuse users and waste SERP real estate.
issues.recommendation: Write a unique description for each page.

issues.message: Thin content (298 words; recommended ≥300)
issues.impact: Pages under ~300 words rarely rank for competitive queries.
issues.recommendation: Expand with examples, FAQs, or supporting depth — or noindex if the page isn't meant to rank.

issues.message: Word 'notes' occurs 13 times (5.8% density)
issues.impact: Over-optimization can trigger spam classifiers and feels unnatural to readers.
issues.recommendation: Reduce keyword density to under 3%; use synonyms and related entities (LSI).

issues.message: 2 pages have identical body content
issues.impact: Duplicate pages compete with themselves for rankings.
issues.recommendation: Canonicalize duplicates to a single authoritative URL or consolidate them.
